name: Sabre Corporation
description: Sabre Corporation is a leading software and technology company serving the global travel industry. Headquartered in Southlake, Texas, the company provides critical technology solutions, including its global distribution system (GDS), to airlines, hotels, and travel agencies worldwide. Operating through its Travel Solutions and Hospitality Solutions segments, Sabre enables travel providers to market, sell, and manage their services more efficiently. With a history rooted in the development of the first computerized reservation systems, Sabre continues to drive innovation in travel retailing, distribution, and fulfillment, helping its partners navigate the complexities of the modern travel ecosystem.
